sentences.target: Ich rechne den Gewinn morgen aus.

translations.de: Ich rechne den Gewinn morgen aus.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ tính lợi nhuận.
translations.nl: Ik reken de winst morgen uit.
translations.hi: मैं कल लाभ की गणना करूँगा.
translations.nb: Jeg skal regne ut overskuddet i morgen.
translations.sv: Jag räknar ut vinsten i morgon.
translations.da: Jeg regner overskuddet ud i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日、利益を計算します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present 1st person singular; with the separable particle 'aus' forms the verb 'ausrechnen' (to calculate/figure out).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks 'Gewinn' as the direct object.
Common noun; the direct object receiving the action of 'ausrechnen'.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action takes place.
Separable verb particle forming 'ausrechnen'; placed at clause-final position in main clauses.

sentences.target: Der Gewinn deckt die Kosten gerade so.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ɡəˈvɪn dɛkt diː ˈkɔstn̩ ɡəˈʁaːdə zoː/

translations.de: Der Gewinn deckt die Kosten gerade so.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ɡəˈvɪn dɛkt diː ˈkɔstn̩ ɡəˈʁaːdə zoː/
translations.en: The profit barely covers the costs.
translations.es: El beneficio apenas cubre los costos.
translations.fr: Le bénéfice couvre tout juste les coûts.
translations.it: Il profitto copre a malapena i costi.
translations.pt: O lucro mal cobre os custos.
translations.vi: Lợi nhuận chỉ vừa đủ để trang trải chi phí.
translations.nl: De winst dekt de kosten maar net.
translations.hu: A nyereség épphogy fedezi a költségeket.
translations.hi: मुनाफा मुश्किल से खर्चों को पूरा करता है.
translations.el: Το κέρδος μετά βίας καλύπτει τα έξοδα.
translations.fi: Voitto juuri ja juuri kattaa kulut.
translations.ja: 利益は費用をかろうじて賄える。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; marks 'Gewinn' as subject.
Common noun; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present 3rd person singular; predicates that the subject covers something.
Definite article, accusative plural; marks 'Kosten' as the direct object.
Plural noun (pluralia tantum); direct object of 'deckt'.
Adverb of degree; together with 'so' forms the idiomatic phrase 'gerade so' meaning 'barely/just enough'.
Adverb of degree; part of the phrase 'gerade so' indicating minimal sufficiency.

sentences.target: Mein Gewinn war nur ein kleiner Gutschein.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ɡəˈvɪn vaːʁ nuːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nɐ ˈɡuːtʃaɪ̯n/

translations.de: Mein Gewinn war nur ein kleiner Gutschein.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ɡəˈvɪn vaːʁ nuːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nɐ ˈɡuːtʃaɪ̯n/
translations.en: My prize was only a small voucher.
translations.es: Mi premio fue solo un pequeño vale.
translations.fr: Mon lot n’était qu’un petit bon d’achat.
translations.it: Il mio premio è stato solo un piccolo buono.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的奖品只是一张小额代金券。
translations.yue: 我個獎品只係一張細額禮券。
translations.ru: Мой приз был всего лишь небольшим сертификатом.
translations.pt: Meu prêmio foi só um pequeno vale.
translations.he: הפרס שלי היה רק שובר קטן.
translations.tr: Ödülüm sadece küçük bir hediye çeki oldu.
translations.vi: Phần thưởng của tôi chỉ là một phiếu quà tặng nhỏ.
translations.nl: Mijn prijs was alleen een kleine waardebon.
translations.uk: Мій приз був лише невеликим сертифікатом.
translations.hu: A nyereményem csak egy kis ajándékutalvány volt.
translations.hi: मेरा इनाम बस एक छोटा वाउचर था.
translations.pl: Moja nagroda była tylko małym bonem.
translations.el: Το έπαθλό μου ήταν μόνο ένα μικρό κουπόνι.
translations.nb: Premien min var bare en liten verdikupong.
translations.sv: Mitt pris var bara ett litet presentkort.
translations.ro: Premiul meu a fost doar un voucher mic.
translations.da: Min gevinst var bare et lille værdibevis.
translations.ja: 私の賞品は小さな商品券だけだった。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Gewinn' and marks possession (1st person singular).
Common noun; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, preterite 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
Focus adverb limiting the scope of the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular; introduces the predicate nominal NP.
Attributive adjective, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Gutschein'.
Common noun; predicate nominal complement of the copula 'war'.

sentences.target: Sie freut sich über den Gewinn vom Quiz.
sentences.reading: /ziː fʁɔɪ̯t zɪç ˈyːbɐ deːn ɡəˈvɪn fɔm kvɪts/

translations.de: Sie freut sich über den Gewinn vom Quiz.
translations.ipa: /ziː fʁɔɪ̯t zɪç ˈyːbɐ deːn ɡəˈvɪn fɔm kvɪts/
translations.en: She is happy about the quiz win.
translations.es: Está contenta por haber ganado el quiz.
translations.fr: Elle est contente d’avoir gagné le quiz.
translations.it: È felice di aver vinto il quiz.
translations.zh-Hans: 她因为赢了测验而很开心。
translations.yue: 佢贏咗個問答遊戲，好開心。
translations.pt: Ela está feliz por ter vencido o quiz.
translations.vi: Cô ấy vui vì đã thắng cuộc thi đố.
translations.nl: Ze is blij dat ze de quiz heeft gewonnen.
translations.pl: Cieszy się z wygranej w quizie.
translations.nb: Hun er glad for å ha vunnet quizen.
translations.sv: Hon är glad över att ha vunnit frågesporten.
translations.ro: Este bucuroasă că a câștigat la quiz.
translations.cs: Má paдost z výhry v kvízu.
translations.da: Hun er glad for at have vundet quizzen.
translations.ja: 彼女はクイズに勝って喜んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative (here 3rd person singular); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present 3rd person singular; used reflexively with 'sich' ('sich freuen' = to be pleased).
Reflexive pronoun, accusative; required by the reflexive verb 'sich freuen'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the PP indicating the cause/topic of joy.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Gewinn' as object of 'über'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'über'.
Fused form of 'von dem' (preposition + definite article, dative); introduces a PP specifying source.
Common noun; complement of 'vom' (dative singular).
